raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 692 would prohibit employers from coercing employees to enter into a Debt Training Repayment Agreement Provision (TRAP) or stay-or-pay contract.",
    "Stay-or-pay contracts impose a de-facto 'exit fee' on workers who choose to leave their job.",
    "AB 692 aims to empower workers to leave jobs with poor working conditions.",
    "Training repayment agreements exploit new nurses by forcing them into financially burdensome contracts.",
    "More than one-in-ten workers are bound by restrictive employment agreements that require incurring debt for on-the-job training.",
    "These debt traps prevent workers from seeking better wages and working conditions.",
    "The use of stay-or-pay contracts may lead to compounding harm to small businesses by limiting their ability to hire talent.",
    "Stay-or-pay contracts have been described as a form of 'modern-day indentured servitude.'"
  ]
}
```
